mapper.select: SELECT id AS quiz_set_id, challenge_date, status, created_at, published_at FROM quiz_sets ORDER BY challenge_date DESC NULLS LAST, id DESC
SELECT id AS quiz_set_id, challenge_date, status, created_at, published_at FROM quiz_sets WHERE id = #{quizSetId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quiz_sets WHERE challenge_date = #{challengeDate} AND status = 'PUBLISHED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO passages (quiz_set_id, position, title, content, topic) VALUES (#{quizSetId}, #{position}, #{title}, #{content}, #{topic})
INSERT INTO questions (passage_id, position, content) VALUES (#{passageId}, #{position}, #{content})
INSERT INTO question_options (question_id, position, content) VALUES (#{questionId}, #{position}, #{content})
INSERT INTO question_keys (question_id, correct_option_id, explanation, evidence) VALUES (#{questionId}, #{correctOptionId}, #{explanation}, #{evidence})
mapper.update: UPDATE quiz_sets SET status = 'PUBLISHED', published_at = #{publishedAt} WHERE id = #{quizSetId} AND status IN ('DRAFT', 'REVIEWED')
